title: daemon/main.rs: redact_token middleware only logs at TRACE — does not mutate URI
description: redact_token_query_param only produces a TRACE log with the token redacted; it does not mutate the request URI. Any TraceLayer or access logger added at INFO would still see and log the raw ?token=... value. The comment 'cannot appear in access logs if a TraceLayer is added in the future' is false. The middleware needs to remove or replace the token in the URI itself to be effective.
